external_references.description: Sarah Yoder, John Wolfram, Ashley Pearson, Doug Bienstock, Josh Madeley, Josh Murchie, Brad Slaybaugh, Matt Lin, Geoff Carstairs, Austin Larsen. (2025, September 24). Another BRICKSTORM: Stealthy Backdoor Enabling Espionage into Tech and Legal Sectors. Retrieved April 16, 2026.

objects.description: [BRICKSTORM](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9015) has leveraged DNS web services to resolve C2 IP addresses including sslip.io and nip.io.(Citation: Google BRICKSTORM September 2025)  [BRICKSTORM](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9015) has also utilized Cloudflare Workers for C2 communications.(Citation: Google BRICKSTORM September 2025)
